query: ("forecast-based intervention" OR "weather-triggered action" OR "heat early warning system" OR "heat-health action plan" OR "anticipatory action" OR "heat wave preparedness" OR "extreme heat advisory" OR "predictive health alert" OR "threshold-triggered policy" OR "lead-time intervention" OR "heat surveillance" OR "heat alert system") AND ("heat mortality" OR "excess mortality" OR "temperature-attributable mortality" OR "heat-related hospitalization" OR "heat-related death" OR "thermal stress" OR "cardiovascular heat" OR "respiratory heat morbidity" OR "heat-related illness") AND ("forecast-based" OR "early warning" OR "warning system" OR "action plan" OR forecasting OR prediction OR anticipatory) AND (evaluation OR assessment OR "quasi-experimental" OR "difference-in-differences" OR "interrupted time series" OR cohort OR longitudinal OR causal OR intervention)
